2606.12984.title: SkillChain: Closing the Loop on Skill Evolution for Image-Based E-Commerce AI Assistants
2606.12984.paper_summary: Image-based AI assistants are now deployed at production scale on e-commerce platforms, where a single uploaded image can trigger fundamentally different user intents: product search, style recommendation, visual encyclopedia, or utility tool calls, each demanding its own response format, tool invocation, and domain knowledge. Without per-intent behavioral constraints, LLM-based systems conflate these heterogeneous modes and fall short of domain quality standards, while the breadth and dynamism of the intent space render manual engineering infeasible. To address this, we present SkillChain, which closes the production feedback loop on Skill evolution, automating the lifecycle of Skills through three stages: Skill Creator for bootstrapping from task specs and trajectories, Route Optimizer for routing alignment, and Body Refiner for iterative Skill Body refinement via dual-path LLM-Judge evaluation. Deployed on a production-scale e-commerce image assistant, SkillChain substantially improves aggregate response quality, with the strongest gains on structural compliance and content quality; a one-week online A/B experiment further confirms significant gains in user engagement, content consumption, and long-term retention.
2606.12984.paper_summary_zh: 影像基礎的 AI 助手現在在電子商務平台上以生產規模部署，單一上傳的影像可以觸發根本不同的使用者意圖：產品搜尋、風格推薦、視覺百科全書或工具呼叫，每一種都需要其特定的回應格式、工具調用和領域知識。若沒有針對意圖的行為約束，基於 LLM 的系統會將這些異質模式混淆，並未達到領域質量標準，而意圖空間的廣度和動態性使得手動工程變得不可行。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 SkillChain，該系統關閉了技能演變的生產反饋循環，通過三個階段自動化技能的生命周期：技能創建者用於從任務規範和軌跡啟動，路徑優化器用於路由對齊，以及身體精煉者通過雙路徑 LLM-Judge 評估進行迭代的技能身體精煉。在一個生產規模的電子商務影像助手上部署後，SkillChain 顯著改善了總體回應質量，在結構合規性和內容質量上獲得了最強的提升；為期一週的線上 A/B 實驗進一步確認了在使用者參與度、內容消耗和長期留存方面的顯著增益。
2606.12984.author: Yimin Hu et.al.
2606.12984.authors: Yimin Hu, Mengtao Xu, Hao Guo, Yuheng Song, Xiaoyong Zhu, Bo Zheng
